enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a strong message of empowerment and defiance, expressing the singer's frustration with certain behaviors.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Vedalam, this song reflects the protagonist's fierce attitude and determination, adding to the film's action-packed narrative.

Who are the artists involved in this song?

The song features vocals by Shruti Haasan and Shakthisree Gopalan, with lyrics by Karky and music composed by Anirudh.

When was this song released?

This energetic track was released on October 15, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Don't you mess with me, Shruti Haasan delivers a powerful performance that resonates with themes of strength and independence. The song is a vibrant expression of defiance, set against the backdrop of the film Vedalam, where the protagonist stands up against challenges. With its catchy beats and engaging lyrics, it evokes feelings of empowerment and motivation. This track is perfect for anyone looking to uplift their spirits and embrace their inner strength.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Don't you mess with me from Vedalam is a high-energy anthem that showcases Shruti Haasan's powerful vocals against Anirudh's electrifying beats. This song perfectly captures the spirit of defiance and empowerment, making it a must-listen for anyone looking to boost their mood. Experience the vibrant fusion of catchy lyrics and dynamic music that will keep you on your feet!
stanzaMeanings: Don't you mess with me, don't you mess with me
The reason I hate guys is this: when there's no calm, a tornado will come and there won't be any circle.
He doesn't have a face, hey girl, when he talks, there's no sweetness.
He won't lie, he won't lie, he won't lie, he won't lie, he won't lie, he won't lie, he won't lie, he won't lie.
If you look at him, hmmm, he won't get angry. He won't turn off.
[ How many days will he act like a good person?
He thought about it and put a room, will my life get ruined? ]
All the girls around the world: single, taken, complicated, it doesn't matter where you're from, say it with me, say it with me.
Don't you mess with me, don't you mess with me, oh my!
Don't you mess with me, don't you mess with me, I'm usually like this.
Don't you mess with me, don't you mess with me, don't provoke me.
Don't you mess with me, don't you mess with me, oh, don't you understand English?
